To instantiate a generic type such as `HashMap<K,V>`, one has to specify the type parameter names and the types, e.g., such as `new HashMap<String K, Integer V>`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: To instantiate a generic type, one needs to specify type parameter names as well as types
